personal.preferred_title: Senior AWS Data Engineer | S3 / Glue / Redshift / Python ETL

summary: Senior AWS Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, AWS Glue, S3, Athena, Redshift, PySpark/Spark, ETL/ELT pipelines, data lakes, data warehouses, data quality, governance, monitoring, and production troubleshooting. Experienced building scalable analytics datasets from structured and semi-structured data, optimizing SQL and data-processing workflows, documenting data systems, and supporting regulated enterprise environments where reliability, security, and cost-aware design matter.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and supported Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines that transformed telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into curated datasets for analytics, forecasting, capacity planning, and executive reporting.
Built AWS-aligned data workflows using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL patterns, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, IAM concepts, and CloudWatch-style monitoring concepts to modernize analytics workloads.
Developed reusable ingestion, transformation, validation, reconciliation, exception-handling, and recurring reporting automation to improve pipeline reliability and reduce manual effort.
Created reporting-ready datasets, Oracle-backed historical retention models, SQL views/tables, and query patterns for operational analytics and stakeholder decision support.
Implemented data quality checks, validation rules, reconciliation logic, and issue investigation workflows to improve confidence in downstream reporting and analytics outputs.
Worked with structured and semi-structured operational data from multiple enterprise monitoring and infrastructure systems, integrating sources into unified reporting layers.
Troubleshot workflow and data issues by tracing source feeds, schema changes, transformation logic, SQL behavior, missing data, and downstream reporting expectations.

Produced data dictionaries, runbooks, validation notes, dashboard narratives, and process documentation to support governance, auditability, secure handling, lineage-style traceability, and production handoff.
Optimized SQL/database access patterns, partitioning-oriented data layouts, and processing approaches to support scalable analytics and cost-aware reporting.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping-engine data platform from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving correctness, performance, and production reliability.
Built validation utilities to compare source and target records across millions of transactions during phased migration cutovers.
Optimized SQL/database access patterns, data structures, and migration routines to maintain sub-second query latency and reduce production risk.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration-support processes to improve repeatability and cutover confidence.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Built SQL, Perl, and Korn Shell extraction/reporting scripts that automated recurring telemetry exports and improved repeatability of operational reports.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, reporting standards, and documentation used across regulated financial-services monitoring and operations teams.
Partnered with application, middleware, database, and operations teams to diagnose production bottlenecks using telemetry, SQL, and system evidence.
Delivered technical documentation, onboarding guidance, and knowledge-sharing materials for application and support teams.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer, Billing Interfaces and Data Workflows
bullets: Developed and supported billing, invoicing, settlement, EDI, and reporting workflows using Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, C/C++, Java/J2EE, XML, Perl, Korn Shell, and UNIX/Linux.
Maintained production data integration interfaces and reporting workflows where accuracy, repeatability, secure processing, and timely support were critical.
Improved data-processing performance through SQL/database optimization, memory reduction, throughput improvements, and production defect triage.
Created technical documentation and support notes for legacy systems, data interfaces, and operational processes.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Java, C, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON, YAML

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark-oriented processing patterns to support curated analytics, query optimization, small-file mitigation, and reliable downstream reporting.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Data Pipeline
projects.description: Built an analytics pipeline that transformed operational telemetry into curated datasets for forecasting, capacity risk analysis, dashboarding, KPI-style reporting, and stakeholder decision-making.

projects.name: AWS Data Lakehouse Learning Track
projects.description: Built focused learning projects around Parquet, Delta Lake, PySpark, AWS-style lakehouse layers, schema enforcement, time travel concepts, partitioning, compaction, and open table format concepts to extend production AWS Glue/S3/Athena experience.
